languages.text: "Я забираю осколок с собой — и оставляю тебя наедине с твоими выборами и решениями. Посмотрим, приведут ли они тебя к повторной встрече со мной... и месту в коллекции. Прощай".

traits.locale_text: "Я забираю осколок с собой — и оставляю тебя наедине с твоими выборами и решениями. Посмотрим, приведут ли они тебя к повторной встрече со мной... и месту в Музеоне. Прощай".
traits.speaker: Trazyn_Ctan_Support

languages.text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."
languages.original_text: "Я забираю осколок с собой — и оставляю тебя наедине с твоими выборами и решениями. Посмотрим, приведут ли они тебя к повторной встрече со мной... и месту в коллекции. Прощай".

traits.locale_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."
"I am taking the shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and another visit to the Museion. Farewell."
"I am taking the shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and another visit to the Museion. Farewell."
"I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

languages.text: “我会带走星神碎片。接下来，就让你独自去面对你所做的那些抉择与断念吧。且看你的选择会不会让你再次与我相遇……让你成为我的藏品。再会。”
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: “我会带走星神碎片。接下来，就让你独自去面对你所做的那些抉择与断念吧。且看你的选择会不会让你再次与我相遇……让你成为我的藏品。再会。”

languages.text: «Me llevaré el fragmento, dejándote con tus elecciones y decisiones. Ya veremos si te conducen a otro encuentro conmigo... y un lugar en mi colección. Adiós».
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: «Me llevaré el fragmento, dejándote con tus elecciones y decisiones. Ya veremos si te conducen a otro encuentro conmigo... y un lugar en mi colección. Adiós».

languages.text: « Je prends l'Écharde. Et je vous laisse réfléchir à vos choix. Voyons s'ils vous mèneront à une future rencontre... et à une place de choix dans ma collection. Adieu. »
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: « Je prends l'Écharde. Et je vous laisse réfléchir à vos choix. Voyons s'ils vous mèneront à une future rencontre... et à une place de choix dans ma collection. Adieu. »

languages.text: "Parça'yı alıyor, seni seçimlerinle ve kararlarınla baş başa bırakıyorum. Bakalım yeniden karşılaşmamızı ve... Koleksiyonumda yer edinmeni sağlayacak mı... Elveda."
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: "Parça'yı alıyor, seni seçimlerinle ve kararlarınla baş başa bırakıyorum. Bakalım yeniden karşılaşmamızı ve... Koleksiyonumda yer edinmeni sağlayacak mı... Elveda."

languages.text: "Ich nehme das Fragment .... und lasse dich mit deinen Entscheidungen allein. Wir werden ja sehen, ob sie dich erneut zu mir führen ... und dir einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescheren. Leb wohl."
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme das Fragment .... und lasse dich mit deinen Entscheidungen allein. Wir werden ja sehen, ob sie dich erneut zu mir führen ... und dir einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescheren. Leb wohl."

languages.text: 「私はシャードを手に入れる。そしてあなたを、あなたの選択と決断に一人残す。それがあなたを、また私との再会と、私のコレクションの中の場所へと導くかどうかは、見てみないとわからない。さらば。」
languages.original_text: "I am taking the Shard — and leaving you alone with your choices and decisions. Let's see if they lead you to another meeting with me... and a place within my collection. Farewell."

traits.locale_text: 「私はシャードを手に入れる。そしてあなたを、あなたの選択と決断に一人残す。それがあなたを、また私との再会と、私のコレクションの中の場所へと導くかどうかは、見てみないとわからない。さらば。」
